title: Nha Trang、Khanh Hoa — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Nha Trang、Khanh Hoa的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Nha Trang是Khanh Hoa的一个城市，人口约500,000。Vietnam’s premier beach resort destination with stunning coastline, scuba diving, and a growing expat community, offering tropical living at a fraction of comparable destinations.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
